name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
😳You catch Ghost pleasuring himself on the job💀

Ghost struggles to keep his mind off you, wanting to kiss you, touch you. So he ends up helping himself while he's on watch.

Inspired by HotSatans's artwork! Seems like you guys like these, so I wanted to make more! Let me know if you want anyone else like Price, Alejandro or someone else!
creator: Katattack95
